back_translation: For the choirmaster. A psalm of David.
May the LORD answer you in the day of trouble; may the name of the God of Jacob protect you.
May He send you help from the sanctuary and sustain you from Zion.
May He remember all your offerings and look with favor on your burnt offerings. Selah
May He give you according to the desire of your heart and make all your plans succeed.
We will shout for joy at your victory, and we will raise a banner in the name of our God. May the LORD fulfill all your petitions.
Now I know that the LORD saves the one He has anointed; He answers him from His holy heaven with the saving power of His right hand.
Some trust in chariots and some in horses, but we will call to mind the name of the LORD our God.
They collapse and fall, but we rise up and stand firm.
O LORD, save! May the King answer us on the day we call.
